title: Seamless doors Seamless Doors (Smooth door animation)
description: This mod add a smooth animation when opening doors in minecraft, instead of the instant opening without an animation
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1432736/description_37af0819-7a6d-4e8d-a95b-1d61bb8bdac7.png)

***
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-DerkOttersberg-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/DerkOttersberg) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-SeamlessMods-F16436?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/seamlessmods/projects) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-SeamlessMods-00AF5C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/SeamlessMods) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/GGKThZVn5p) [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T31WKMZG)

***

# About

Tired of instant door animations? Smooth Door Animations transforms Minecraft's default instant mechanics into buttery-smooth, vanilla-quality animations that bring life to one of the game's most basic interactions.

***

## Features

*   Smooth, satisfying door opening and closing animations
*   Vanilla-quality enhancement that feels right at home in Minecraft
*   Incredibly lightweight with minimal performance impact
*   Seamlessly blends into your gameplay experience

***

![Door Animation](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1471/890/opendoorgif2-gif.gif) ![Door Animation](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1471/891/opendoorgif-gif.gif)

### Recommended Pairing

For the ultimate door experience, pair this mod with **[Remodeled Doors 3D by Ecorn](link-here)**. This resource pack has fantastic synergy with Smooth Door Animations, taking your doors from good to gorgeous!

## Compatibility

*   ✅ Works seamlessly with your favorite modpacks
*   ✅ Fully compatible with shaders
*   ✅ Resource pack friendly
*   ✅ Minimal performance impact

## Notes

This mod is designed to be lightweight and performance-friendly. You won't even notice it's there until you try playing without it!

## Bugs and Support

This is a passion project, and I'm committed to making it work flawlessly in every scenario! If you encounter any bugs or incompatibilities, please don't hesitate to reach out. Your feedback helps make this mod better for everyone.
